title: Chef Aid Apple Corer, Multi Function Fruit Corer with Round Serrated End for Easy Use and Removal - Made from High Grade Stainless Steel, Dishwasher Safe
features: ESSENTIAL - The Chef Aid Stainless steel apple corer is an essential tool for every home cook and baker who loves to make apple-based recipes such as pies, tarts, and cake
HIGH GRADE - Made from High Grade stainless steel, this corer is durable, easy to clean, and rust-resistant, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliability

SERRATED END -The sharp, serrated tip easily cuts through apples, removing the core quickly and efficiently, while the ergonomic handle provides a comfortable grip, making it easy to use even for those with limited hand strength
VERSATILE - This apple corer is versatile and can also be used to core other fruits and vegetables, such as pears and tomatoes, making it a must-have tool in every kitchen
DISHWASHER SAFE - This stainless steel fruit corer is dishwasher safe and is also resistant to rust and corrosion, meaning cleaning up after cooking or baking is simple
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
